upper_intermediate.title: Present Perfect Simple or Continuous
upper_intermediate.content:
📌 Present Perfect Simple – Dùng khi nào?
1. Hành động quá khứ đã HOÀN THÀNH, có kết quả ở hiện tại:
John has broken his leg – he's in hospital now.
Sue has left. (= She is not here anymore.)

2. Dùng với just (vừa xảy ra):
Mike has just called. He said he'd call you back.

3. Dùng với already / yet:
She has already finished the report. / She hasn't called me yet.

4. Kinh nghiệm trong cuộc đời (không nói thời điểm cụ thể):
He has been to the moon. / I have never read this book.

5. Tình huống bắt đầu QK và VẪN còn ở hiện tại (stative verbs):
I have known her for ten years. (= I still know her)
She has lived here since 2010.
📌 Present Perfect Continuous – Dùng khi nào?
1. Hành động bắt đầu QK, vẫn đang tiếp diễn – nhấn mạnh THỜI GIAN KÉO DÀI:
I have been waiting for hours! (= Tôi vẫn đang đợi, nhấn mạnh sự lâu dài)
She has been studying all morning. (= She might still be studying)

2. Hành động vừa kết thúc, có DẤU HIỆU NHÌN THẤY ở hiện tại:
You have been crying. (= Your eyes are red.)
I'm dirty because I have been painting.

3. Hành động lặp đi lặp lại từ QK đến nay:
She has been calling me every day this week.
He has been working very hard lately.
⚠️ Phân biệt: Simple vs Continuous
Present Perfect SimplePresent Perfect Continuous
Nhấn mạnh kết quả (đã xong)Nhấn mạnh quá trình / thời gian
I have painted the wall. (= It's done.)I have been painting. (= That's why I'm dirty.)
Who has eaten my cookies? (= none left)Who has been eating my cookies? (= some left)
I have watched the series. (= finished, saw last episode)I have been watching the series. (= still watching)
Dùng với stative verbs: know, love, believe, have...Chỉ dùng với dynamic verbs: run, work, wait, study...

✦ Với for / since: cả hai thì đều dùng được với dynamic verbs, nhưng continuous nhấn mạnh quá trình.
I have lived here for 5 years. (fact) / I have been living here for 5 years. (process, temporary feel)
I have been working all day – that's why I'm so tired.Quá trình kéo dài → dấu hiệu hiện tại → Continuous
She has finished the report. You can read it now.Hoàn thành, có kết quả → Simple
He has been running – look how red his face is!Vừa xong, thấy dấu hiệu rõ → Continuous

exercises.q: I ___ all day. That's why I'm so tired.
exercises.exp: Nhấn mạnh quá trình kéo dài → dấu hiệu mệt → Continuous

exercises.q: She ___ this book twice. She knows it very well.
exercises.exp: Kinh nghiệm đã hoàn thành, kết quả rõ ràng → Simple

exercises.q: Look at him! He ___ – his eyes are all red.
exercises.exp: Dấu hiệu nhìn thấy ở hiện tại (mắt đỏ) → Continuous

exercises.q: I ___ her since we were children. We're best friends.
exercises.exp: know = stative verb → không dùng Continuous → Simple

exercises.q: They ___ on this project for three months and still haven't finished.
exercises.opts: have been working,have worked,work,had been working
exercises.exp: Nhấn mạnh thời gian kéo dài, chưa xong → Continuous

exercises.q: Someone ___ my coffee! There's only half a cup left.
exercises.exp: Còn lại một nửa (chưa hết) → nhấn mạnh quá trình → Continuous

exercises.q: She ___ just ___ the last chapter. The book is on the table.
exercises.exp: just + kết quả hoàn thành → Simple

exercises.q: How long ___ you ___ for the bus? You must be freezing!
exercises.exp: Hỏi về thời gian kéo dài, vẫn đang đợi → Continuous

exercises.q: I ___ never ___ sushi. I'd love to try it one day.
exercises.exp: Kinh nghiệm trong cuộc đời với never → Simple

exercises.q: He ___ three emails to the manager but hasn't received a reply yet.
exercises.exp: Số lượng xác định (three) → kết quả cụ thể → Simple

exercises.q: The children ___ in the garden all afternoon. They're covered in mud.
exercises.exp: Dấu hiệu nhìn thấy (dính bùn), quá trình → Continuous

exercises.q: I ___ the report already. You can start checking it.
exercises.exp: already + kết quả → Simple

exercises.q: She ___ Italian for two years and can hold a conversation now.
exercises.exp: Quá trình học kéo dài, kết quả nhìn thấy → Continuous phổ biến hơn

exercises.q: We ___ this house since 2015. We love it here.
exercises.exp: own = stative verb → không dùng Continuous

exercises.q: The phone ___ off the hook all morning. Something must be wrong.
exercises.exp: Hành động lặp đi lặp lại suốt buổi sáng → Continuous

exercises.q: I'm exhausted. I ___ to finish this novel all week.
exercises.exp: Nhấn mạnh nỗ lực kéo dài cả tuần → Continuous

exercises.q: She ___ to Japan, Australia, and Brazil. She loves travelling.
exercises.exp: Kinh nghiệm các địa điểm → have been to = đã từng đến → Simple

exercises.q: The kitchen smells wonderful. What ___ you ___?
exercises.exp: Dấu hiệu nhìn thấy/ngửi thấy → quá trình vừa xong → Continuous

exercises.q: He ___ for the company for over 20 years. He's their most loyal employee.
exercises.exp: Cả Simple và Continuous đúng; Simple nhấn mạnh fact/tổng thời gian

exercises.q: ___ she ___ her homework yet? It's almost midnight!
exercises.exp: yet + câu hỏi về kết quả → Simple

exercises.q: You look terrible! ___ you ___ (sleep) enough lately?
exercises.exp: Nhấn mạnh quá trình gần đây (lately) → Continuous

exercises.q: I ___ (finish) painting the bedroom. Come and have a look!
exercises.exp: Kết quả hoàn thành → Simple

exercises.q: She ___ (run). Her face is red and she's out of breath.
exercises.exp: Dấu hiệu thể hiện rõ ràng → Continuous

exercises.q: We ___ (know) each other since university. That's fifteen years!
exercises.exp: know = stative → only Simple

exercises.q: He ___ (write) his novel for three years but it's still not done.
exercises.exp: Quá trình chưa kết thúc, kéo dài → Continuous

exercises.q: I ___ (lose) my keys. I can't find them anywhere!
exercises.exp: Kết quả hiện tại: tôi không có chìa khóa → Simple

exercises.q: They ___ (argue) all evening – you can hear them through the walls.
exercises.exp: Kéo dài cả buổi tối, vẫn đang diễn ra → Continuous

exercises.q: She ___ (win) three prizes this year. She's incredibly talented.
exercises.exp: Số lượng cụ thể (three), kết quả rõ → Simple

exercises.q: I ___ (wait) for ages! Where have you been?
exercises.exp: Nhấn mạnh thời gian dài (for ages) → Continuous

exercises.q: He ___ (not/eat) anything since this morning. He must be starving.
exercises.exp: since + kết quả (vẫn đói) → Simple (stative result)

exercises.q: The scientists ___ (study) this virus for months and finally have a breakthrough.
exercises.exp: Quá trình kéo dài hàng tháng dẫn đến kết quả → Continuous

exercises.q: I ___ (just/send) you the document. Please check your inbox.
exercises.exp: just + hành động vừa xong → Simple

exercises.q: She ___ (not/call) yet. Should we be worried?
exercises.exp: yet trong câu phủ định → Simple

exercises.q: He ___ (feel) much better since he started the new medication.
exercises.exp: feel (dynamic use) kéo dài từ QK → Continuous; hoặc Simple đều OK

exercises.q: We ___ (already/book) the hotel. All you need to do is pack.
exercises.exp: already + kết quả hoàn thành → Simple

exercises.q: Your hands are covered in flour. ___ you ___ (bake)?
exercises.exp: Dấu hiệu bột mì trên tay → Continuous

exercises.q: I ___ (never/try) skydiving. It sounds terrifying!
exercises.exp: Kinh nghiệm cuộc sống với never → Simple

exercises.q: The kids ___ (watch) TV all afternoon instead of doing homework.
exercises.exp: Hoạt động kéo dài cả buổi chiều → Continuous

exercises.q: He ___ (read) the whole book in one sitting. He loved it.
exercises.exp: Hoàn thành toàn bộ, kết quả rõ → Simple

exercises.q: I ___ (think) about changing careers recently. What do you think?
exercises.exp: think = dynamic (cân nhắc), quá trình đang diễn ra → Continuous

reorder.words: she has been working all day and looks exhausted
I have never eaten sushi in my life
he has just finished the report you can read it now
how long have you been waiting for the bus
they have been arguing all evening through the walls
she has won three awards this year alone
I have known him since we were at school together
you have been crying your eyes are really red
have you finished your homework yet it is almost midnight
the phone has been ringing off the hook all morning
we have already booked the hotel so you just need to pack
she has been studying Italian for two years and speaks well
I have lost my keys and cannot find them anywhere
he has been writing his novel for three years without finishing
the children have been playing in the garden all afternoon
I have been thinking about changing my job recently
has she called you back yet or is she still busy
they have lived in this house since two thousand and fifteen
your hands are dirty because you have been painting the fence
I have been trying to contact him all week with no reply

passage.text: Anna is a writer who {{1}} on her debut novel for the past three years. She {{2}} already three chapters, but she feels the story is still not quite right. This morning she looks pale and tired – she {{3}} all night trying to fix the plot. She {{4}} this kind of sleepless night before, so she knows she just needs to push through. Her editor {{5}} her twice this week, but she {{6}} the phone yet. On her desk, empty coffee cups show just how hard she {{7}} lately. She {{8}} every word of the first chapter ten times already. Her friends are worried because she {{9}} much since the project started. However, Anna feels confident – she {{10}} better stories than anyone expects.

The local marathon {{1}} every year for the past decade, and this year's event {{2}} the most participants ever. Many runners {{3}} for months to prepare. Look at Marco – he {{4}} clearly. His legs are shaking and his shirt is soaked. He {{5}} not a marathon before, so this is a big moment. His coach {{6}} him since January, and the results are clear. Marco {{7}} twenty kilograms and {{8}} his personal best time twice this year. The crowd {{9}} enthusiastically since the race began two hours ago. The commentator says no one {{10}} so much improvement in such a short time.

Dr Pham {{1}} rare tropical diseases for fifteen years and {{2}} several important discoveries during that time. This week, she looks exhausted because she {{3}} day and night to complete a new paper. She {{4}} never {{5}} this type of pressure before, but she is determined to succeed. Her team {{6}} the same data all week trying to find patterns. So far, they {{7}} three interesting connections that nobody {{8}} before. The head of the laboratory {{9}} their work closely and {{10}} already three drafts of the final report.

It is clear that Lena {{1}} very hard on her fitness goals this year. She {{2}} the gym every single morning since January and {{3}} already fifteen kilograms. Her diet {{4}} completely since she started working with a nutritionist. She {{5}} sugar and processed food for months now, which explains why her skin {{6}} so much better lately. She {{7}} yoga three times a week and says it {{8}} her manage stress. Her friends say they {{9}} never {{10}} her look this healthy and full of energy.

The construction company {{1}} on the new bridge for over two years and {{2}} three major milestones already. Engineers {{3}} around the clock to meet the deadline, and the results are impressive. Recently, the chief engineer {{4}} that one of the foundations {{5}} cracking, which is a serious problem. The team {{6}} the fault for the past week but {{7}} not yet {{8}} a solution. Meanwhile, local residents {{9}} about the noise and disruption, but the company {{10}} no official response yet.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một kỹ năng hoặc thói quen bạn đang cố gắng xây dựng – bạn đã làm điều đó bao lâu và đã đạt được những gì (dùng cả Simple và Continuous để tương phản quá trình và kết quả)
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Present Perfect Simple for achievements, Continuous for ongoing process
writing_prompts.example: For the past eight months, I have been learning to play the guitar. I have already mastered five chords and have performed in front of a small group of friends. The hardest part has been building finger strength, which I have been working on every single day. I have not yet managed to play my favourite song all the way through without mistakes, but I have been making steady progress. My teacher says I have improved more in this time than most beginners do in a full year.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một tình huống hiện tại của bạn hoặc người khác – tại sao người đó trông mệt / vui / bẩn / xúc động (dùng Continuous để giải thích nguyên nhân từ hành động vừa xảy ra)
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Present Perfect Continuous for visible present results
writing_prompts.example: My colleague looks absolutely exhausted today. She has been working on the annual report since last Monday and has barely slept. She has been attending back-to-back meetings all week and has been answering emails late into the night. That is why her eyes are so red and she has been drinking coffee non-stop all morning. Despite everything, she has already submitted two sections of the report and has done a brilliant job under pressure.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về những điều bạn đã trải nghiệm trong cuộc sống (kinh nghiệm, thành tích, chuyến đi) dùng Present Perfect Simple
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Present Perfect Simple for life experiences with never/ever/already/yet
writing_prompts.example: I have always loved exploring new cultures, and over the years I have visited twelve different countries. I have tried foods that I could never have imagined eating, including insects in Thailand and fermented fish in Scandinavia. I have never regretted any of my travels, even when things went wrong. I have not yet been to South America, but I have already started saving money for a trip to Peru. These experiences have shaped the person I have become, and I would not change any of them.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một vấn đề đang xảy ra ở cộng đồng hoặc môi trường – điều gì đã thay đổi và mọi người đang làm gì (kết hợp Simple và Continuous)
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Present Perfect Simple for changes, Continuous for ongoing actions
writing_prompts.example: Air pollution in our city has worsened significantly over the past decade. The local government has already introduced several measures to address the problem, but campaigners say it is not enough. Environmental groups have been monitoring air quality for years and have recorded dangerously high levels on multiple occasions. Recently, volunteers have been planting trees along the main roads, and local schools have been raising awareness among young people. The city council has promised to ban old diesel vehicles by next year, which has given many residents hope.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về người bạn thân nhất của bạn – bạn đã quen biết họ bao lâu, bạn đã cùng nhau làm những gì và gần đây họ đang làm gì
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Mix of Present Perfect Simple (shared experiences) and Continuous (recent ongoing activity)
writing_prompts.example: I have known my best friend Minh since we were seven years old, which means we have been friends for over twenty years. We have been through a lot together – exams, heartbreak, career changes, and long-distance periods. We have always supported each other without judgement, and we have never let a disagreement last more than a day. Recently, Minh has been working on a startup and has been putting in incredibly long hours. I have been worried about him, but he has assured me that everything is going well. We have already planned a short trip together for next month, which we are both excited about.

upper_intermediate.title: Narrative Tenses: All Past Tenses
upper_intermediate.content:
📌 Bốn thì quá khứ trong kể chuyện
ThìVai trò trong câu chuyệnVí dụ
Past SimpleChuỗi hành động chính, sự kiện nối tiếp nhauShe walked in, sat down, and looked around.
Past ContinuousBối cảnh; hành động đang xảy ra khi sự kiện khác xen vàoIt was raining. She was reading when he called.
Past Perfect SimpleHành động xảy ra TRƯỚC thời điểm câu chuyện (flashback)She had never been there before. He had already left.
Past Perfect ContinuousHành động KÉO DÀI trước thời điểm câu chuyệnShe had been waiting for over an hour when he finally arrived.
📌 Would / Used to trong kể chuyện quá khứ
used to + V: Thói quen hoặc trạng thái QK không còn (dùng cho cả hành động và trạng thái):
When I was young, I used to spend hours reading.
She used to be very shy. (trạng thái)

would + V: Thói quen QK lặp đi lặp lại (CHỈ hành động, KHÔNG dùng cho trạng thái):
Every summer, we would go to the beach. He would always sing in the car.

❌ I would be nervous when I was young. → ✅ I used to be nervous.
❌ She would have long hair. → ✅ She used to have long hair.
📌 Từ nối trong kể chuyện
Chức năngTừ nối
Thứ tự sự kiệnFirst, Then, After that, Next, Eventually, Finally, In the end
Thời gian đột ngộtSuddenly, Just then, At that moment, All of a sudden
Song songMeanwhile, At the same time, In the meantime
Tương phảnHowever, Although, Despite, Nevertheless
Kết quảAs a result, Consequently, So, Therefore
She had been waiting for an hour when the taxi finally arrived.Kéo dài trước → Past Perfect Continuous; hành động chính → Past Simple
It was raining. People were hurrying past. Suddenly a car stopped.Bối cảnh → Continuous; sự kiện đột ngột → Simple
Every weekend, we would drive to the coast – we used to love it there.Thói quen lặp → would; trạng thái → used to

exercises.q: While I ___ for the bus, I ___ an old friend unexpectedly.
exercises.exp: Đang chờ (nền) → Continuous; gặp (xen vào) → Simple

exercises.q: She ___ never ___ abroad before that trip to Paris.
exercises.exp: never + trước thời điểm câu chuyện → Past Perfect

exercises.q: By the time the police arrived, the thief ___.
exercises.exp: Trốn TRƯỚC khi cảnh sát đến → Past Perfect

exercises.q: The children ___ noisily in the classroom when the teacher walked in.
exercises.exp: Đang nói chuyện (bối cảnh) khi giáo viên bước vào → Past Continuous

exercises.q: I realised I ___ my wallet at home when I reached the checkout.
exercises.exp: Để quên TRƯỚC khi nhận ra → Past Perfect

exercises.q: She ___ for hours when she finally found what she was looking for.
exercises.opts: had been searching,was searching,has been searching,searched
exercises.exp: Kéo dài TRƯỚC khi tìm thấy → Past Perfect Continuous

exercises.q: He ___ to start the car but it ___ the night before.
exercises.opts: tried/had broken down,was trying/broke down,tried/broke down,had tried/had broken down
exercises.exp: Thử (Simple); xe hỏng TRƯỚC (Past Perfect)

exercises.q: When I was young, I ___ spend hours playing outside after school.
exercises.opts: used to,would,was used to,had used to
exercises.exp: Thói quen quá khứ không còn nữa → used to (cả hai đúng, nhưng used to phổ biến hơn)

exercises.q: Every morning, my grandfather ___ the newspaper while ___ his coffee.
exercises.opts: would read/drinking,used to read/drank,read/was drinking,was reading/drank
exercises.exp: Thói quen lặp đi lặp lại → would + V

exercises.q: It ___ and the streets ___ completely empty.
exercises.exp: Bối cảnh thời tiết + trạng thái đường phố → Past Continuous/Simple

exercises.q: After she ___ the letter, she sat down and started to cry.
exercises.exp: Đọc TRƯỚC khi ngồi xuống khóc → Past Perfect

exercises.q: The team ___ on the project for six months when the client suddenly cancelled it.
exercises.opts: had been working,was working,worked,has been working
exercises.exp: Kéo dài TRƯỚC khi bị hủy → Past Perfect Continuous

exercises.q: She opened the envelope and ___ a cheque for £10,000 inside.
exercises.exp: Hành động đơn tiếp nối nhau → Past Simple

exercises.q: I ___ there for three hours before I realised I was in the wrong building.
exercises.opts: had been sitting,was sitting,sat,have been sitting
exercises.exp: Ngồi đợi 3 tiếng TRƯỚC khi nhận ra → Past Perfect Continuous

exercises.q: She ___ very confident as a child. She never spoke in public.
exercises.opts: didn't use to be,wouldn't be,wasn't used to be,used to not be
exercises.exp: Trạng thái QK (tự tin) → dùng used to (not), không dùng would

exercises.q: Just then, the door ___ open and a stranger ___.
exercises.opts: burst/walked in,was bursting/was walking in,had burst/walked in,bursts/walks in
exercises.exp: Đột ngột → hai hành động nối tiếp → Past Simple

exercises.q: Meanwhile, the other team ___ unaware of what ___ outside.
exercises.exp: Trạng thái đồng thời (remained Simple); sự việc đang xảy ra bên ngoài → Continuous

exercises.q: We ___ at the same café every Saturday for years until it closed down.
exercises.opts: would meet,used to meeting,had met,were meeting
exercises.exp: Thói quen lặp, hành động → would + V

exercises.q: She looked pale because she ___ for the entire flight.
exercises.opts: had been feeling sick,felt sick,was feeling sick,has been feeling sick
exercises.exp: Kéo dài TRƯỚC khi nhìn thấy → Past Perfect Continuous

exercises.q: He ___ his lines perfectly by the time the performance started.
exercises.exp: Học thuộc TRƯỚC khi biểu diễn → Past Perfect

exercises.q: She ___ (walk) along the street when she ___ (notice) something strange in the window.
exercises.exp: Đang đi (nền) → Continuous; nhận ra (xen vào) → Simple

exercises.q: By the time the ambulance arrived, the doctors ___ (already/start) the operation.
exercises.exp: Đã bắt đầu TRƯỚC khi xe cứu thương đến → Past Perfect

exercises.q: Every evening, my grandmother ___ (sit) in her armchair and ___ (tell) us stories.
exercises.exp: Thói quen lặp đi lặp lại → would + V

exercises.q: He was exhausted because he ___ (drive) for twelve hours without a break.
exercises.exp: Lái xe 12 tiếng TRƯỚC khi mệt → Past Perfect Continuous

exercises.q: The lights ___ (go out) suddenly while everyone ___ (dance).
exercises.exp: Tắt điện đột ngột (Simple); đang nhảy (bối cảnh, Continuous)

exercises.q: I ___ (not/realise) that she ___ (leave) until I called her number.
exercises.exp: Không nhận ra (Simple); cô ấy đã đi TRƯỚC → Past Perfect

exercises.q: As a teenager, he ___ (be) very quiet and ___ (not/like) being around crowds.
exercises.ans: used to be / didn't use to like
exercises.exp: Trạng thái và thái độ QK → used to

exercises.q: When I arrived at the party, most people ___ (already/go) home.
exercises.exp: Về trước khi tôi đến → Past Perfect

exercises.q: The music ___ (play) softly in the background while the guests ___ (arrive).
exercises.exp: Bối cảnh đồng thời → hai Continuous

exercises.q: She ___ (cry) for so long that her eyes were completely swollen.
exercises.exp: Khóc kéo dài TRƯỚC kết quả nhìn thấy → Past Perfect Continuous

exercises.q: He ___ (open) the letter, ___ (read) it quickly, and then ___ (tear) it up.
exercises.exp: Ba hành động nối tiếp → Past Simple

exercises.q: My parents ___ (meet) at university. They ___ (study) the same subject.
exercises.exp: Gặp nhau (Simple); đang học cùng khoa (bối cảnh Continuous)

exercises.q: As a child, she ___ (spend) every summer at her grandparents' farm.
exercises.exp: Thói quen hè mỗi năm → used to hoặc would

exercises.q: I ___ (look) for my passport for an hour when I finally ___ (find) it in my coat pocket.
exercises.exp: Tìm 1 tiếng TRƯỚC khi thấy → Past Perfect Continuous / Past Simple

exercises.q: Suddenly, a dog ___ (run) out of nowhere and ___ (crash) into the cyclist.
exercises.exp: Đột ngột, sự kiện nhanh → Past Simple

exercises.q: He ___ (not/expect) to win the prize because he ___ (never/enter) that competition before.
exercises.exp: Không ngờ (Simple); chưa bao giờ tham gia TRƯỚC → Past Perfect

exercises.q: Meanwhile, her sister ___ (wait) outside in the car, completely unaware of the situation.
exercises.exp: Đang chờ song song → Past Continuous

exercises.q: By the time the show ___ (start), the audience ___ (queue) outside for over two hours.
exercises.exp: Bắt đầu (Simple); xếp hàng kéo dài TRƯỚC → Past Perfect Continuous

exercises.q: We ___ (not/speak) for two years before we finally ___ (make) up at a mutual friend's wedding.
exercises.exp: Không nói chuyện TRƯỚC → Past Perfect; làm lành (Simple)

exercises.q: The detective ___ (examine) the crime scene carefully and ___ (notice) something the others ___ (miss).
exercises.exp: Hai hành động Simple; miss TRƯỚC → Past Perfect

we had not spoken for two years before we finally made up

writing_prompts.vi: Kể một câu chuyện về khi bạn đến muộn hoặc bỏ lỡ điều gì đó quan trọng – sử dụng đầy đủ các thì quá khứ để mô tả bối cảnh, hành động và những gì đã xảy ra trước
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Past Simple (events), Past Continuous (background), Past Perfect (what happened before)
writing_prompts.example: Last year, I missed the most important interview of my career. I had been preparing for weeks and was feeling confident. On the morning itself, I was travelling on the metro when it suddenly stopped between stations due to a technical fault. By the time I managed to get out and find a taxi, the interview had already started without me. I called the company in a panic, but they had already moved on to the next candidate. I felt devastated because I had worked so hard to get that chance. However, in the end, it led to a different opportunity that turned out to be even better.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một thói quen hoặc cuộc sống trước đây của bạn hoặc ai đó trong gia đình – dùng used to và would để mô tả những điều không còn xảy ra nữa
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: used to (habits and states), would (repeated actions), Past Simple for specific events
writing_prompts.example: When I was growing up in the countryside, life was very different from what it is today. We used to wake up before sunrise every morning and would help my father with the farm animals. My grandmother used to cook enormous breakfasts, and the whole family would sit together at a long wooden table. We did not use to have much money, but we used to be incredibly happy. Every Sunday, my parents would drive us to the river, where we would spend the whole afternoon fishing and playing. Those simple days have stayed with me, and I think about them whenever city life feels overwhelming.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một buổi tối hoặc sự kiện đáng nhớ – mô tả bối cảnh, những gì đang xảy ra, và sau đó một sự kiện bất ngờ làm thay đổi mọi thứ
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Past Continuous (setting the scene), Past Simple (sudden event), Past Perfect (what had happened before)
writing_prompts.example: We were sitting in a small restaurant celebrating my friend's birthday. Everyone was laughing and the evening was going perfectly. We had been there for about two hours when suddenly the lights went out. At first, we thought it was a power cut, but then we heard a strange noise coming from the kitchen. It turned out that the chef had accidentally started a small fire, which the staff had already put out by the time anyone noticed. We were all slightly shaken, but the restaurant offered us free dessert, which quickly lifted the mood. It was a birthday none of us will ever forget.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể câu chuyện về một nhân vật trong một tình huống bí ẩn hoặc kịch tính – ai đó đang điều tra hoặc tìm kiếm điều gì đó, và cuối cùng phát hiện ra sự thật
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: All four past tenses in a narrative context
writing_prompts.example: The detective had been watching the building for three nights when she finally noticed something unusual. A light had been flickering on the fourth floor, even though the building was supposed to be empty. She walked quietly up the stairs and pushed open the door. Inside, a young man was sitting at a desk surrounded by papers. He had been living there for weeks without anyone knowing. It turned out that he had discovered important documents that several powerful people wanted to destroy. Meanwhile, his colleagues had been looking for him across the city. The detective sat down, took out her notebook, and said, 'I think you'd better start from the beginning.'

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về lần đầu tiên bạn làm điều gì đó quan trọng – bạn đã chuẩn bị thế nào, cảm thấy ra sao và điều gì đã xảy ra
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Past Perfect (preparation before), Past Continuous (feelings/background), Past Simple (what happened)
writing_prompts.example: The first time I performed on stage, I had been rehearsing for two months. I had never done anything like it before, and I was feeling terrified as I waited in the wings. The other performers were chatting quietly, but I could not speak. I had memorised every line perfectly, yet my mind felt completely blank. When the moment came, I walked on, looked out at the audience, and something clicked. The words came naturally, and I performed without a single mistake. By the time I walked off the stage, the audience was applauding and I had completely forgotten that I had been nervous at all.

upper_intermediate.title: Future Continuous and Future Perfect
upper_intermediate.content:
📌 Future Continuous: will be + V-ing
1. Hành động đang diễn ra tại một thời điểm cụ thể trong tương lai:
This time tomorrow, I will be flying to Singapore.
At midnight, the train will be passing through the mountains.

2. Hỏi về kế hoạch/ý định của người khác một cách lịch sự (không áp lực):
Will you be using the car tonight? (= I'm just asking politely)
Will you be attending the conference next week?

3. Hành động sẽ tự nhiên diễn ra (vì đó là kế hoạch đã có):
I will be passing the post office – I'll post your letter for you.

✦ Dấu hiệu: this time tomorrow/next week, at [time] tomorrow, in two hours, when...
📌 Future Perfect: will have + V3
Hành động sẽ HOÀN THÀNH trước một thời điểm hoặc hành động khác trong tương lai:
By next June, she will have graduated.
By the time you arrive, I will have cooked dinner.
Don't worry – the technician will have fixed your laptop by 5 pm.

✦ Dấu hiệu: by (then / next week / 2030), by the time..., before..., in [time]
📌 Future Perfect Continuous: will have been + V-ing
Nhấn mạnh thời gian kéo dài của một hành động tính đến thời điểm tương lai:
By next year, she will have been working here for ten years.
By the time the film ends, we will have been sitting here for three hours.
📐 Bảng so sánh tổng hợp Future Tenses
ThìCông thứcÝ nghĩa chính
Future Simplewill + VQuyết định tức thời, dự đoán, lời hứa
be going toam/is/are going to + VKế hoạch đã quyết định, bằng chứng hiện tại
Future Continuouswill be + V-ingĐang xảy ra tại thời điểm TL
Future Perfectwill have + V3Hoàn thành TRƯỚC thời điểm TL
Future Perfect Continuouswill have been + V-ingKéo dài đến thời điểm TL (nhấn mạnh thời gian)
Don't call me at 8 – I will be having dinner.Đang ăn lúc 8h → Future Continuous
By 10pm, the film will have finished.Xong trước 10pm → Future Perfect
By next June, she will have been studying here for three years.Thời gian kéo dài đến tương lai → Future Perfect Continuous

exercises.q: This time next week, I ___ on a beach in Thailand.
exercises.opts: will be lying,will lie,am lying,would lie
exercises.exp: Đang nằm tắm nắng tại thời điểm TL → Future Continuous

exercises.q: By the time she arrives, I ___ dinner for everyone.
exercises.opts: will have cooked,will cook,am cooking,would have cooked
exercises.exp: Nấu xong TRƯỚC khi cô ấy đến → Future Perfect

exercises.q: Don't call at 9 pm – we ___ a team meeting.

exercises.exp: Đang họp lúc 9h → Future Continuous

exercises.q: By 2035, engineers ___ fully autonomous vehicles for everyday use.

exercises.exp: Phát triển xong trước 2035 → Future Perfect

exercises.q: I promise I ___ the project before the deadline.

exercises.q: At midnight, the plane ___ over the Pacific Ocean.

exercises.q: By next March, she ___ for this company for exactly ten years.

exercises.q: At 8 am tomorrow, the surgeon ___ the operation.

exercises.q: By the time this film ends, we ___ here for four hours.

exercises.q: She ___ the report by Monday, I promise you.
exercises.exp: Nộp xong trước thứ Hai → Future Perfect

exercises.q: This time next year, we ___ our new office in the city centre.
exercises.opts: will be using,will use,use,would be using
exercises.exp: Đang dùng văn phòng mới vào thời điểm TL → Future Continuous

exercises.q: By 2040, renewable energy ___ fossil fuels as the main power source.
exercises.opts: will have replaced,will replace,is replacing,would have replaced
exercises.exp: Thay thế xong trước 2040 → Future Perfect

exercises.q: By the time he retires, he ___ this organisation for over thirty years.
exercises.opts: will have been leading,will be leading,has led,would have led

exercises.q: This time tomorrow, she ___ (sit) on a plane to New York.
exercises.exp: Đang ngồi trên máy bay lúc đó → Future Continuous

exercises.q: By 6 pm, I ___ (finish) all my reports for the day.
exercises.exp: Xong trước 6h → Future Perfect

exercises.q: Don't call at 8 pm – we ___ (have) dinner with the clients.

exercises.q: By the time she arrives, he ___ (already/leave).

exercises.q: At midnight, the factory ___ (produce) its ten-millionth unit.
exercises.exp: Đang sản xuất lúc nửa đêm → Future Continuous

exercises.q: By 2030, scientists ___ (discover) solutions to many current health problems.
exercises.exp: Tìm ra giải pháp trước 2030 → Future Perfect

exercises.q: ___ you ___ (use) the meeting room at three? I need to book it.
exercises.exp: Hỏi lịch sự về kế hoạch → Future Continuous

exercises.q: By the time the film ends, we ___ (sit) here for over three hours.
exercises.exp: 3 tiếng tính đến khi phim kết → Future Perfect Continuous

exercises.q: She ___ (live) here for ten years by next January.
exercises.exp: 10 năm tính đến tháng Một tới → Future Perfect Continuous

exercises.q: By the time you read this letter, I ___ (leave) the city.
exercises.exp: Rời đi trước khi đọc → Future Perfect

exercises.q: This time next month, they ___ (travel) through South America.
exercises.exp: Đang du lịch tại thời điểm TL → Future Continuous

exercises.q: By the end of March, she ___ (work) here for exactly twenty years.
exercises.exp: 20 năm tính đến tháng Ba → Future Perfect Continuous

exercises.q: I promise I ___ (complete) the design before the client meeting.
exercises.exp: Hoàn thành trước cuộc họp → Future Perfect

exercises.q: At 9 am tomorrow, the team ___ (present) the new proposal to the board.

exercises.q: By the time the guests arrive, she ___ (decorate) the entire apartment.
exercises.exp: Trang trí xong trước khi khách đến → Future Perfect

exercises.q: Don't worry – the engineer ___ (repair) the system before the office opens.
exercises.exp: Sửa xong trước khi văn phòng mở → Future Perfect

exercises.q: I expect they ___ (announce) the results by Friday afternoon.
exercises.exp: Thông báo xong trước thứ Sáu → Future Perfect

exercises.q: We ___ (present) our research at the conference at 2 pm tomorrow.
exercises.exp: Đang trình bày lúc 2h → Future Continuous

exercises.q: By 2035, the city ___ (build) a completely new public transport network.
exercises.exp: Xây xong trước 2035 → Future Perfect

exercises.q: This time next year, they ___ (run) their own business for two years.
exercises.exp: 2 năm tính đến năm sau → Future Perfect Continuous

passage.text: A city planner is presenting a vision for the capital in 2040. By that time, the city {{1}} a fully integrated metro network that {{2}} millions of commuters every day. Engineers {{3}} five new bridges by then. In the mornings, residents {{4}} to work on electric trams instead of cars. The old industrial zones {{5}} transformed into green public spaces. Solar panels {{6}} electricity for most buildings. By 2040, architects {{7}} a new waterfront district. When the next generation grows up, they {{8}} a completely different city. And by that time, the capital {{9}} some of the most ambitious urban development projects in the world. Meanwhile, new universities {{10}} opening across the region throughout the decade.

By the time Linh turns thirty, she {{1}} her own sustainable fashion brand for five years. At that point, she {{2}} a team of over forty designers and craftspeople. While her peers {{3}} for large corporations, Linh {{4}} ethical products for global markets. By 2028, her company {{5}} partnerships with retailers in twelve countries. Her mentor says that by then, Linh {{6}} that hard work and values can go together. In the evenings, she still {{7}} by hand, just as she did as a student. By the end of the decade, her brand {{8}} over two hundred young artisans. This time next year, Linh {{9}} at an international sustainability summit. And by the time she retires, she {{10}} a lasting legacy in the fashion industry.

The research team {{1}} their experiment for eight months by the time they publish the results. At the moment of publication, scientists around the world {{2}} their findings carefully. By the end of the conference, the lead researcher {{3}} the key conclusions to over six hundred delegates. Journalists {{4}} live updates all morning. Within a year, other laboratories {{5}} the same methods. By 2027, the team {{6}} a larger follow-up study. While the paper {{7}} in journals, students {{8}} it in universities everywhere. By the time a treatment is available, researchers {{9}} more than fifteen years on this condition. This time next spring, the team {{10}} their next major breakthrough.

Imagine it is the year 2045. Artificial intelligence {{1}} most routine cognitive tasks in offices worldwide. Humans {{2}} far more time on creativity and human connection. By then, AI systems {{3}} languages instantly, making real-time translation universally available. By 2045, most vehicles {{4}} autonomous, and traditional driving schools {{5}} into technology training centres. Architects {{6}} new cities that are entirely self-sufficient in energy. Urban farmers {{7}} vertical gardens in residential buildings for decades. By the middle of the century, communities {{8}} how to live with far less environmental impact. This time in 2045, engineers {{9}} on the next generation of clean energy technology. By 2060, human activity {{10}} net zero carbon emissions globally.

By the time Nam graduates, he {{1}} three international internships and {{2}} two professional certifications. During his final semester, he {{3}} his dissertation while also preparing for job interviews. By graduation day, his supervisor {{4}} his research as outstanding. At the ceremony, hundreds of proud families {{5}} their graduates walk across the stage. After five years at the same consultancy, he {{6}} his way to senior partner. His colleagues say that by the time he reaches forty, he {{7}} the entire sector. This time in ten years, Nam {{8}} junior consultants the skills he has developed. The firm {{9}} many more graduates like him by then. And by the end of his career, he {{10}} a real and lasting difference.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả kế hoạch của bạn trong 5 năm tới: tại các thời điểm cụ thể bạn sẽ đang làm gì và bạn sẽ hoàn thành được điều gì
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Future Continuous (in progress) & Future Perfect (completed by a point)
writing_prompts.example: By this time next year, I will be studying at a graduate school abroad. I will have completed all the application requirements by the end of this month. Over the next two years, I will be focusing entirely on my research and will have published at least one academic paper by the time I graduate. By the time I turn thirty, I will have built a solid professional network and will have gained experience in my field through internships. This time in five years, I will be working for an international organisation, doing work that genuinely makes a difference.

writing_prompts.vi: Tưởng tượng ngày bạn nghỉ hưu: bạn sẽ nhìn lại và thấy rằng mình đã hoàn thành được những gì trong cuộc đời
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Future Perfect for life achievements viewed from a future moment
writing_prompts.example: By the time I retire, I will have worked in education for over thirty-five years. I will have taught thousands of students and will have seen many of them go on to do incredible things. Over my career, I will have written several books and will have presented my research at conferences around the world. I will have raised a family that I am deeply proud of, and I will have travelled to every continent at least once. Most importantly, I hope that by then, I will have made a genuine contribution to my community and will have left things a little better than I found them.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một ngày bận rộn sắp tới – mô tả những gì bạn sẽ đang làm vào các thời điểm khác nhau trong ngày
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Future Continuous for actions in progress at specific future times
writing_prompts.example: Tomorrow is going to be an incredibly busy day. At eight in the morning, I will be sitting in a strategy meeting with the senior management team. By noon, I will be having lunch with a client to discuss the terms of a new contract. At two in the afternoon, I will be delivering a presentation to the whole company. While I am doing all of this, my assistant will be coordinating arrangements for the evening event. By seven, I will be greeting guests at the annual company dinner. By the time I finally get home, I will have been on my feet for over fourteen hours.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả thế giới năm 2050 – con người sẽ đang làm gì và nhân loại đã thay đổi điều gì trước thời điểm đó
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Future Continuous & Future Perfect for predictions about the future world
writing_prompts.example: By 2050, the world will have changed beyond recognition. Scientists will have developed clean energy sources that have completely replaced fossil fuels. People will be living in smart cities where artificial intelligence manages everything from traffic to waste collection. By that time, medicine will have advanced so dramatically that many diseases we fear today will have been eradicated. Humans will be spending more time on creative pursuits because machines will have taken over most repetitive tasks. Governments will have signed global agreements on climate, and carbon emissions will have fallen to near zero. It will be a challenging but extraordinary world to inhabit.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một dự án hoặc mục tiêu lớn mà bạn đang hướng tới – bạn sẽ hoàn thành nó trước khi nào và bạn sẽ đang làm gì trong quá trình đó
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Future Perfect for completion targets, Future Continuous for ongoing process
writing_prompts.example: My biggest goal over the next three years is to launch my own business. By the end of this year, I will have completed a business management course and will have written a full business plan. Throughout next year, I will be working with a mentor and will be testing my ideas with a small group of early customers. By the time I officially launch, I will have been developing the concept for over two years and will have secured initial funding. This time next year, I will be building the website and will be finalising the product range. By the time the business turns three, I will have created a small team and will have established a loyal customer base.

upper_intermediate.title: Review of All Verb Tenses (B1–B2)
upper_intermediate.content:
📌 Tổng hợp tất cả thì động từ – Present Tenses
ThìCông thứcDùng khi nào
Present SimpleV / V-sThói quen, sự thật, lịch trình cố định
Present Continuousam/is/are + V-ingĐang diễn ra, tạm thời, kế hoạch TL đã sắp xếp
Present Perfect Simplehave/has + V3Kinh nghiệm, kết quả, just/already/yet, khoảng thời gian đến hiện tại
Present Perfect Continuoushave/has been + V-ingQuá trình kéo dài đến hiện tại, nguyên nhân của kết quả hiện tại
📌 Tổng hợp – Past Tenses
ThìCông thứcDùng khi nào
Past SimpleV2 / V-edHành động hoàn thành trong QK, chuỗi sự kiện
Past Continuouswas/were + V-ingBối cảnh QK, đang diễn ra khi việc khác xảy ra
Past Perfect Simplehad + V3Xảy ra TRƯỚC một thời điểm QK
Past Perfect Continuoushad been + V-ingKéo dài TRƯỚC một thời điểm QK
📌 Tổng hợp – Future Tenses
ThìCông thứcDùng khi nào
Future Simplewill + VQuyết định tức thời, dự đoán, lời hứa, đề nghị
be going toam/is/are going to + VKế hoạch đã quyết định, bằng chứng hiện tại
Future Continuouswill be + V-ingĐang xảy ra tại thời điểm TL
Future Perfectwill have + V3Hoàn thành TRƯỚC thời điểm TL
Future Perfect Continuouswill have been + V-ingKéo dài đến thời điểm TL
⚠️ Những lỗi thường gặp
❌ I am knowing → ✅ I know (stative verb)
❌ She has went → ✅ She has gone
❌ When I will arrive → ✅ When I arrive (future time clause → Present Simple)
❌ I lived here since 2010 → ✅ I have lived here since 2010
❌ I would be shy → ✅ I used to be shy (state → used to)
❌ She has been to the moon yesterday → ✅ She went to the moon (specific time → Past Simple)
I have been working here since 2018. I work as a software engineer.Continuous = quá trình; Simple = thực tế vĩnh viễn
She was watching TV when he came home and told her the news.Bối cảnh Continuous; sự kiện Simple

exercises.q: She ___ to work by bus every day, but today she ___ because it's raining heavily.
exercises.exp: Thói quen → Simple; hôm nay tạm thời → Continuous

exercises.q: I ___ this city for twenty years and I still love it.
exercises.opts: have lived in,live in,am living in,lived in
exercises.exp: Từ QK đến nay, không nói khi nào kết thúc → Present Perfect

exercises.q: By the time he retires, he ___ this company for over thirty years.
exercises.exp: Hoàn thành trước thời điểm TL → Future Perfect

exercises.q: She ___ when the earthquake struck, so she didn't feel it.
exercises.exp: Đang ngủ (bối cảnh) khi động đất (xen vào) → Past Continuous

exercises.q: I ___ my keys! I can't open the door.
exercises.exp: Kết quả hiện tại (không vào được) → Present Perfect

exercises.q: When I ___ home, my mother was cooking dinner.
exercises.exp: Về nhà (xen vào) → Past Simple; bối cảnh nấu ăn → Continuous

exercises.q: This time next year, I ___ at a university in the UK.
exercises.exp: Đang học tại thời điểm TL → Future Continuous

exercises.q: She ___ for three hours when she finally found what she was looking for.
exercises.opts: had been searching,was searching,has been searching,searched
exercises.exp: Tìm 3 tiếng TRƯỚC khi thấy → Past Perfect Continuous

exercises.q: Look at those dark clouds – it ___ to rain any minute.
exercises.exp: Bằng chứng hiện tại (mây đen) → be going to

exercises.q: He ___ Italian for two years now and he's getting really good.
exercises.exp: Quá trình kéo dài đến hiện tại, nhấn mạnh → Present Perfect Continuous

exercises.q: By the time the guests arrive, we ___ the preparations.
exercises.opts: will have finished,will finish,are finishing,would finish
exercises.exp: Xong trước khi khách đến → Future Perfect

exercises.q: Every summer, we ___ to my grandparents' village – it's a lovely tradition.
exercises.exp: Thói quen QK không còn → used to / would (both possible but used to implies it stopped)

exercises.q: I promise I ___ you as soon as I have any news.
exercises.opts: will call,am calling,call,am going to call
exercises.exp: Lời hứa ngay tại thời điểm nói → will

exercises.q: She ___ the exam three times before she finally passed.
exercises.exp: Ba lần TRƯỚC khi thi đỗ → Past Perfect

exercises.q: I ___ ever ___ anything like this before. It's completely new to me.
exercises.exp: Kinh nghiệm cuộc sống với never/ever → Present Perfect

exercises.q: Don't disturb her – she ___ on an important presentation right now.
exercises.exp: Đang làm ngay lúc này → Present Continuous

exercises.q: The train ___ at 6:15 – don't be late!
exercises.exp: Lịch trình cố định → Present Simple

exercises.q: She ___ in Paris since she got the promotion. She loves it there.
exercises.exp: Từ khi thăng chức đến nay → Present Perfect (Simple or Continuous both OK)

exercises.q: By the end of this month, she ___ here for exactly one year.
exercises.opts: will have been working,will be working,has worked,will work
exercises.exp: 1 năm tính đến cuối tháng → Future Perfect Continuous

exercises.q: Just then, the door ___ open and a stranger ___.
exercises.opts: burst/walked in,was bursting/walked in,burst/was walking in,bursts/walks in
exercises.exp: Đột ngột, hai sự kiện nối tiếp → Past Simple + Past Simple

exercises.q: She ___ (not/see) her sister for three years before they finally met at the reunion.
exercises.exp: Không gặp TRƯỚC khi gặp lại → Past Perfect

exercises.q: I ___ (think) about buying a new laptop. What do you recommend?
exercises.exp: Đang cân nhắc, quá trình gần đây → Present Perfect Continuous

exercises.q: The concert ___ (start) at 8pm – don't arrive late.
exercises.exp: Lịch trình cố định → Present Simple

exercises.q: By 2030, the government ___ (build) fifty new hospitals across the country.
exercises.exp: Xây xong trước 2030 → Future Perfect

exercises.q: I ___ (just/finish) the book. You can borrow it now.
exercises.exp: just + kết quả hoàn thành → Present Perfect Simple

exercises.q: At 10 am tomorrow, they ___ (present) the proposal to the investors.
exercises.exp: Đang trình bày lúc 10h → Future Continuous

exercises.q: She ___ (work) as a teacher for fifteen years before she switched careers.
exercises.exp: Thời gian TRƯỚC khi đổi nghề → Past Perfect (Continuous)

exercises.q: He ___ (never/fly) before, so he was very nervous at the airport.
exercises.exp: Chưa bao giờ bay TRƯỚC khi đó → Past Perfect

exercises.q: Water ___ (boil) at 100 degrees Celsius at sea level.
exercises.exp: Sự thật khoa học → Present Simple

exercises.q: I ___ (study) for this exam all week. I'm exhausted.
exercises.exp: Quá trình cả tuần, dấu hiệu hiện tại → Present Perfect Continuous

exercises.q: She ___ (read) when I called, so she didn't hear the phone.
exercises.exp: Đang đọc (bối cảnh) khi tôi gọi → Past Continuous

exercises.q: By next June, they ___ (run) their restaurant for three years.
exercises.exp: 3 năm tính đến tháng 6 tới → Future Perfect Continuous

exercises.q: Look at those clouds. It ___ (rain) – take an umbrella!
exercises.exp: Bằng chứng nhìn thấy ngay (mây đen) → be going to

exercises.q: He ___ (write) three novels by the time he was thirty. Remarkable!
exercises.exp: Ba cuốn trước năm 30 tuổi → Past Perfect

exercises.q: I promise I ___ (not/tell) anyone your secret.
exercises.exp: Lời hứa ngay tại thời điểm nói → will

exercises.q: She ___ (live) in three different countries before settling in Canada.
exercises.exp: Sống ở ba nước TRƯỚC khi định cư → Past Perfect

exercises.q: The team ___ (already/find) a solution by the time the manager arrived.
exercises.exp: Tìm ra giải pháp TRƯỚC khi quản lý đến → Past Perfect

exercises.q: These days, more and more people ___ (work) from home regularly.
exercises.exp: Xu hướng đang thay đổi → Present Continuous

exercises.q: By the end of today, I ___ (answer) over a hundred emails.
exercises.exp: Xong trước cuối ngày → Future Perfect

exercises.q: Every evening, my father ___ (sit) in his armchair and ___ (read) the newspaper.
exercises.exp: Thói quen QK lặp lại (hành động) → would

reorder.words: she has been learning Italian for two years and is very good now
by the time he retires he will have led the company for thirty years
I was reading when the power went out and it became very dark
she had taken the exam three times before she finally passed it
this time tomorrow he will be presenting his research to the board
I have just finished the report you can start reviewing it now
look at those clouds it is going to rain take an umbrella
we had never seen anything like it before and were completely speechless
she was sleeping when the earthquake struck so she did not feel it
by next March she will have been working here for exactly ten years
every summer we would drive to the coast and stay for a week
I promise I will call you as soon as I hear any news
by the time we arrived the film had already started without us
she is working from home this week because her office is being renovated
he had been searching for his passport for an hour before he found it
the train leaves at six fifteen so please do not be late
by two thousand and thirty the city will have built a new metro line
just then the alarm went off and everyone ran out of the building
I have been thinking about this problem all day and need a break
she had lived in three countries before she finally settled in Canada

She {{4}} as a freelance designer for five years now, and she {{5}} more than she could have imagined when she first started. This week, she {{6}} on a large branding project for an international client. She {{7}} the first draft already, but she {{8}} the final version yet. By the end of today, she {{9}} over forty hours on this single project. If all goes well, the client {{10}} the designs by Friday and she will finally be able to rest.

Last weekend, I {{1}} something quite unexpected. I {{2}} through an old box of photographs when I {{3}} a picture of a woman I didn't recognise. I {{4}} her for a while, trying to remember. It {{5}} one of those faces that seems somehow familiar but that you can't quite place. Then, suddenly, I {{6}}. It was my great-grandmother, who {{7}} before I was born. My mother {{8}} me that she {{9}} a teacher for decades and {{10}} across the country to give talks on women's education.

He {{5}} the same data set every day for the past month. So far, his team {{6}} some alarming patterns that nobody {{7}} before. By the time the report is published, the team {{8}} over five hundred pages of data. Meanwhile, journalists {{9}} to interview him, but he {{10}} any requests until the research is complete.

By the time the summit begins next month, world leaders {{1}} months preparing their positions. At the opening session, the host nation's president {{2}} to a live audience of thousands. While delegates {{3}} inside, protesters {{4}} outside in the square. By the end of the first day, negotiators {{5}} a preliminary agreement on at least three key issues. This time next week, journalists {{6}} results to media audiences worldwide. Throughout the event, translators {{7}} non-stop. By the final session, the participants {{8}} together for over seventy-two hours. If all goes well, the world {{9}} a new era of cooperation – at least that {{10}} the hope.

Lan {{1}} on the same career path since she was a teenager. She {{2}} law at university, and when she {{3}}, she {{4}} already three internships at top firms. She {{5}} at the firm where she {{6}} her career for eight years now, and next year she {{7}} for ten years. During that time, she {{8}} some of the most complex cases in the region. Right now, she {{9}} on a high-profile case that {{10}} national attention. By the time it concludes, she {{11}} more than a year of her life to it. She {{12}} never regretted her choice.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về hành trình học tiếng Anh của bạn – bạn đã học được bao lâu, đã đạt được những gì, và bạn vẫn đang làm gì để tiến bộ (sử dụng nhiều thì khác nhau)
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Review of all tenses: Present Perfect, Continuous, Past Simple, Future Perfect
writing_prompts.example: I have been studying English for about ten years, though I only started taking it seriously five years ago. When I was at school, I used to find grammar incredibly difficult and would often give up in frustration. However, since I discovered that I genuinely enjoy reading novels in English, everything has changed. I have read over thirty books and have watched hundreds of hours of English-language films. These days, I am focusing on improving my writing and academic vocabulary. By the end of this year, I will have completed an advanced course and will have sat an international exam. I have not yet achieved the level I want, but I have come a very long way.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một ngày đáng nhớ trong cuộc đời bạn – những gì đã xảy ra, bối cảnh như thế nào, và sự kiện đó đã ảnh hưởng đến cuộc sống của bạn như thế nào
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Past Simple (events), Past Continuous (background), Past Perfect (what had happened before), Present Perfect (lasting impact)
writing_prompts.example: The day I received my university acceptance letter is one I will never forget. I had been waiting for weeks and had almost given up hope. When the email finally arrived, I was sitting in a café trying to distract myself with a book. I read it three times before I believed it was real. My hands were shaking as I called my parents. That moment changed everything. Before that letter arrived, I had been considering dropping my application entirely because I felt I had not performed well enough. Since that day, I have approached challenges very differently and have learnt to trust the process rather than catastrophise.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy mô tả công việc hoặc ngành nghề lý tưởng mà bạn muốn theo đuổi – bạn đang chuẩn bị gì hiện nay và bạn hy vọng đạt được gì trong tương lai
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Present tenses (current situation), Future Continuous and Future Perfect (future goals)
writing_prompts.example: I have always been passionate about environmental engineering, and I am currently doing everything I can to build my qualifications in that field. I have been taking online courses in sustainable design for the past year and have already completed two certifications. Right now, I am volunteering with a local environmental charity to gain practical experience. By this time next year, I will be doing a postgraduate degree at a specialist university. By the time I graduate, I will have spent three years immersed in the field and will have built a strong professional network. I genuinely believe that within a decade, I will be making a real contribution to the way cities manage energy and waste.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một người trong gia đình bạn – cuộc đời của họ trong quá khứ, hiện tại họ đang làm gì và bạn nghĩ tương lai của họ sẽ ra sao
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: All tenses: past narrative, present description, future prediction
writing_prompts.example: My father has always been the hardest working person I know. He grew up in a small village and used to walk several kilometres to school every day. When he was young, he had very little access to books or technology, but he taught himself to read using whatever he could find. He has been working in construction for over thirty years and has built a solid career through sheer determination. These days, he is slowing down a little and is spending more time at home with the family. I think that by the time he retires, he will have worked for nearly four decades and will have built enough savings to travel and enjoy himself. He has never complained once about how hard his life has been, which makes me admire him even more.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết một đoạn bình luận về một vấn đề xã hội hoặc môi trường – những gì đã xảy ra, điều gì đang diễn ra hiện nay và thế giới sẽ thay đổi như thế nào nếu chúng ta hành động hoặc không hành động
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: All tenses in an analytical/argumentative context
writing_prompts.example: Climate change has been one of the most discussed issues of the past three decades, yet global temperatures have continued to rise despite international agreements. Scientists have been warning us for years that we are running out of time, and many of their predictions have already come true. Currently, governments around the world are investing more in renewable energy than ever before, but critics argue it is still not enough. If we do not act decisively in the next ten years, we will have caused irreversible damage to ecosystems that have existed for millions of years. However, there is reason for optimism. By 2040, solar and wind power will have become the dominant energy sources in most countries, and carbon emissions will have fallen significantly from their current peak. The question is whether we will have done enough, soon enough.
